name: Product Readiness QA Safety Policy
description: Host-enforced policy for classifying Product Readiness QA manifest actions before anything can affect commerce systems.
default_reason: Actions that are not explicitly allowlisted default to operator approval.

rules.name: Blocked destructive action types
rules.reason: This action type is destructive, external, or outside the Product Readiness QA safety envelope.

rules.name: Blocked destructive write scopes
rules.reason: Destructive and external side effects are blocked before approval can be requested.

rules.name: Read-only mode write gate
rules.reason: Read-only mode only permits read, audit, and recommendation scopes without approval.

rules.name: Approval-required commerce writes
rules.reason: Publishing, live merchandising, pricing, and inventory changes require operator approval.

rules.name: Production-adjacent write gate
rules.reason: Production-adjacent writes require approval in production runs.

rules.name: Safe draft and audit actions
rules.reason: Draft enrichment, read-only checks, audit flags, and merchandising recommendations do not directly modify live production state.
